data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Virtual waiting room' feature, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature within the system. The absence of any evidence supporting the existence of a virtual waiting room constitutes a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a 'Virtual waiting room'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
